title: ASIC Sustainability Reporting Review
investigation_objective: Serve as DFAPTI's proof-of-concept trigger source: track ASIC's administration of the mandatory Chapter 2M sustainability reporting regime not as an investigation of ASIC itself, but as a feeder for the target discovery layer (dfapti/targets/). Any named entity that surfaces in this material alongside a public-interest indicator (an enforcement action, a relief decision naming an applicant, an audit finding) is a candidate for dfapti/scripts/discover_targets.py, screened and — only once independently verified — promoted to its own case per the Target Visibility Gate (dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md). This case's own evidence register tracks the regulatory activity that produces those candidates, not findings about named companies itself.
scope: ASIC publications, guidance and data relating to mandatory sustainability reporting obligations, tracked here as the source that generates target-discovery candidates — not as findings about ASIC. As of 2026-07-21, the ASIC material captured (E-001 through E-013) does not name specific reporting entities; ASIC's early-observations desktop review and its relief-decisions register both describe outcomes/decisions without naming the applicants or reports sampled. No candidates have been extracted from this case's evidence yet for that reason, not for lack of trying. Federal Court, Parliament, ANAO and the Federal Register of Legislation are tracked here only for the legislative/audit framework that establishes the regime itself; any entity-naming enforcement material from those bodies also routes to target discovery rather than this case's own register.
